format.note: Format changes applied to error.rs and lib.rs

findings.details: All 3 refactors (02, 03, 04) compile and pass tests independently. No circular deps.
Phase A binding rule preserved: Option<LlmBackend> uses in agents.rs (per-agent builder pattern), no with_* setters on production Orchestrator, no Default impl on required subsystems.

Refactor 01 grep: 8 matches (legitimate builder patterns). Refactor 02 grep: multiple files implement WiringReport. Refactor 03 grep: 41+ hits (legitimate non-ID uses). Refactor 04 grep: 0 in daemon/src production code.

refactor01OptionSubsystems.actual: 8 (all legitimate: 7 in agents.rs builder patterns, 1 in cfg-gated builder.rs)
refactor01OptionSubsystems.verdict: At target - all matches are legitimate builder patterns, none on Orchestrator struct itself

refactor02WiringReport.actual: Multiple files in orchestrator and core implement WiringReport
refactor02WiringReport.verdict: Compliant - WiringReport impls present for all required subsystems

refactor03RawUuid.actual: 41+ hits in orchestrator/daemon (all legitimate non-ID uses)
refactor03RawUuid.verdict: Compliant - no domain-field Uuid types, only test helpers, fingerprints, etc.

refactor04StringlyTypedError.verdict: Compliant - stringly-typed error matching eliminated from production code

phaseABindingRuleVerification.optionOnOrchestrator: NOT PRESENT - Orchestrator struct has Arc<dyn LlmBackend>
phaseABindingRuleVerification.withSettersOnOrchestrator: NOT PRESENT in production - OrchestratorBuilder methods are cfg-gated

independentLandingVerification.refactor02Surface: WiringReport trait and impls in swell-core and swell-orchestrator
independentLandingVerification.refactor03Surface: Newtype IDs (TaskId, SessionId, etc.) in swell-core
